title: Kobo Heat Wave
lead: Kobo is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kobo has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 27%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 4.9 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
